content: I'll help you set up GitHub Release publishing for ccdash via Argo Workflows. Let me start by examining the existing patterns and the ccdash project structure.

args.description: Check what was in the last commit

output:
# ccdash-ci WorkflowTemplate
#
# CI pipeline for ccdash (Go TUI dashboard).
# - Main branch: runs lint, vet, build checks
# - Tag push (vX.Y.Z): builds multi-arch binaries and publishes GitHub Release
#
# Bead: bf-57z
#
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: WorkflowTemplate
metadata:
  name: ccdash-ci
  namespace: argo-workflows
  labels:
    app: ccdash-ci
spec:
  entrypoint: ci
  serviceAccountName: argo-workflow
  arguments:
    parameters:
      - name: branch
        value: main
      - na

args.description: Verify the ccdash-ci workflow template and sensor are properly deployed and configured
args.subject: Verify ccdash-ci setup

output: Task #4 created successfully: Verify ccdash-ci setup
Updated task #1 status

args.new_string:
spec:
  eventBusName: default
  dependencies:
    - name: ccdash-push
      eventSourceName: github-webhooks
      eventName: ccdash
      filters:
        data:
          - path: headers.X-Github-Event
            type: string
            value:
              - push
          - path: body.ref
            type: string
            value:
              - refs/heads/main
    - name: ccdash-tag
      eventSourceName: github-webhooks
      eventName: ccdash
      filters:
        data:
          - path: headers.X-Github-Event
            type: string
            value:
              - push
          - path: body.ref
            type: string
            value:
              - refs/tags/v
  triggers:
    - template:
        name: ccdash-ci-trigger
        argoWorkflow:
          operation: submit
          source:
            resource:
              apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
              kind: Workflow
              metadata:
                generateName: ccdash-ci-
                namespace: argo-workflows
              spec:
                serviceAccountName: argo-workflow
                workflowTemplateRef:
                  name: ccdash-ci
      conditions: ccdash-push
    - template:
        name: ccdash-release-trigger
        argoWorkflow:
          operation: submit
          source:
            resource:
              apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
              kind: Workflow
              metadata:
                generateName: ccdash-release-
                namespace: argo-workflows
              spec:
                serviceAccountName: argo-workflow
                workflowTemplateRef:
                  name: ccdash-ci
                arguments:
                  parameters:
                    - name: tag
                      value: "{{`{{`}}dependencies.ccdash-tag.body.ref{{`}}`}}"
                    - name: version
                      value: "{{`{{`}}dependencies.ccdash-tag.body.ref | replace \"refs/tags/\", \"\" | replace \"v\", \"\"{{`}}`}}"
                    - name: commit-sha
                      value: "{{`{{`}}dependencies.ccdash-tag.body.after{{`}}`}}"
      conditions: ccdash-tag
args.old_string:

  eventBusName: default
  dependencies:
    - name: ccdash-push

      eventName: ccdash
      filters:

          - path: body.ref
            type: string
            value:
              - refs/heads/main
  triggers:
    - template:
        name: ccdash-ci-trigger
        argoWorkflow:
          operation: submit
          source:
            resource:
              apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
              kind: Workflow
              metadata:
                generateName: ccdash-ci-
                namespace: argo-workflows
              spec:
                serviceAccountName: argo-workflow
                workflowTemplateRef:
                  name: ccdash-ci
      conditions: ccdash-push

args.description: Add ccdash event source to github-eventsource.yml
args.subject: Add ccdash event source to github-eventsource.yml

args.new_string:
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # Rust release repos (build binary → GitHub release)
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    ccdash:
      repositories:
        - owner: jedarden
          names:
            - ccdash
      webhook:
        endpoint: /ccdash
        port: "12000"
        method: POST
        url: https://webhooks-ci.ardenone.com
      events:
        - push
      apiToken:
        name: github-webhook-secret
        key: token
      webhookSecret:
        name: github-webhook-secret
        key: webhook-secret
      insecure: false
      active: true
      contentType: json
    needle:
